U 499(3T)?#73 14-8-1999 'SRTf^JTTRI «n I 773 OI/2001 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA-EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEP 3(i)J MINISTRY OF HEALTH & FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th March, 2001 G.S.R. 169(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that the use of the fixed dose combination of Diazepam and Diphcrniydrarnine Hydrochloride is likely to involve risk to human beings and that in the publ ic interest it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution of the said combination of Diazepam and Diphenhydramine Hydrochloride, Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 26A of the Drags and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Go vemment hereby makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India hi tlie Ministry of Health &Farnily Welfare, No GSR 578(E) dated 23rd July, 1981, namely — In the Table appended to the said notification, aftersorialNo 58 and the entries relating thereto, tlie following shall be added, namely — "59 Fixed dose combination of Diazepam and Diphenhydramine Hydrochloride " |F No.X 110I4/1/200I-DMS&PFA] DEEPAK GUPTA, JL Secy Foot Note —The Principal Notification waspubhshcd in the Gazette of India vide GSR No 578(E) dated 23-7-1983 and last amended vide GSR 499(E) dated 14-8-1999.
